source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

overview.summary: The map of the Jonstown area depicts nearby villages, sacred sites, inns, ruins, trade routes, and adventure locations. Some are further detailed in other Starter Set materials, but Book 2 identifies them for use around Jonstown.

locations.name: Apple Lane
locations.detail: Overdeveloped but quiet roadside hamlet intended as a travel stop.

locations.name: Chaos Ground
locations.detail: Tainted place created by the Crimson Bat's bleeding in 1602, now a power site for Chaos.

locations.name: Dangerford
locations.detail: Important trade village on the road between Alda-Chur and Boldhome.

locations.name: Dangerford Fort
locations.detail: Strategic crossing fort over The Creek and site of many battles.

locations.name: Dragonewt Road
locations.detail: Magic road marked by carved plinths and used by dragonewts to move through the Middle World in uncanny ways.

locations.name: Drum Top
locations.detail: Hill associated with the giant Lant Ulfar and special drumming magic.

locations.name: Dwarf Cliff
locations.detail: Sheer cliff said to hide a sealed dwarf colony.

locations.name: Geo's Ridge Inn
locations.detail: High mountain inn cut into solid rock.

locations.name: Geo's River Inn
locations.detail: Caravanserai protected by dragonewts on a safer trade route.

locations.name: Goodhaven
locations.detail: Cinsina village and caravan stopping point.

locations.name: Larnste's Table
locations.detail: Plateau sacred to Orlanth Adventurous and site of Sartarite defeat.

locations.name: Mernyr's Landing
locations.detail: Small farm community around an abandoned estate.

locations.name: Old Vampire Cave
locations.detail: Dark and evil place best avoided.

locations.name: Rainbow Mounds
locations.detail: Ancient colorful mound complex with cavern labyrinth and multiple occupants over time.

locations.name: Two Ridge Fort
locations.detail: Ancient fortress and political-religious center of the Malani Tribe.

locations.name: White Crow Inn
locations.detail: Roadside rest stop between Jonstown and Alda-Chur.

regional_pattern.summary: The area around Jonstown is dense with clan settlements, tribal centers, sacred geography, trade infrastructure, and old mythic or military ruins, making it a strong sandbox for local adventures.
